notes: Nine liquid species and three volatile vapor species are documented.
The Phase 2 parameter artifact is separated from earlier ionic-fit outputs.
5 of 5 constants have repo-local source values; solver use is gated by generated residual diagnostics.
R1-R5 source values are carried as fixed activity-basis candidate inputs in the Phase 2 native solver run.
Using pinned ePC-SAFT commit 9f51afd0f9c11a6497ddca05c8b2dd0ea0ffa785 with generic reactive speciation and electrolyte bubble support.
Phase 2 is an activity-based evaluation, not a finalized joint-regression result.
